raw_consumer_statement:
Dear CFPB Representative, I am writing to formally file a complaint against American Express ( Amex ) regarding multiple unresolved issues involving my XXXX XXXX XXXX : XXXX. Incomplete Delivery Dispute XXXX XXXX XXXX I made a purchase from XXXX XXXX XXXX using my Amex XXXX XXXX XXXX, which included XXXX bottles of perfume totaling over {$300.00}. I received only XXXX bottle, and the second item, valued at approximately {$180.00}, was missing from the package. 

Despite filing multiple disputes and clearly stating that I only received part of the order, Amex continues to deny my dispute, relying solely on XXXX generic delivery confirmation, which only shows that a package was deliverednot that it contained both items. I am requesting a full and proper investigation and a refund of {$180.00} for the missing item. 

XXXX. Credit Limit Reduction Due to Identity Theft In addition, I have been a victim of identity theft, which led to fraudulent accounts appearing on my credit report and a significant drop in my credit score. As a result, American Express reduced my credit limit, despite the fact that I have never missed a payment and have maintained a strong payment history with them. 

This credit limit reduction has caused further harm by increasing my credit utilization rate and compounding the damage to my credit profilethrough no fault of my own. I have submitted disputes with the credit bureaus and notified Amex of the identity theft. I am respectfully requesting that my original credit limit be restored in light of these extenuating circumstances.
